MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACOB, JACK COURT TRIAL SET FOR AUG-28-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JUDGE: RONALD COMBEST/CLERK:ECLAVERIA/RPTR:LESLIE GARBER- COOPER 9:20AM: C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PLFF APPEARED THRU COUNSEL JEFF MARGULIES, AND DEFT NOT PRESENT. CASE ON PROVE-UP. PLFF PRESENTED ORAL AND DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE. JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF FOR POSSESSION & RESTITUTION OF PREMISES, RENT AND DAMAGES, ATTY FEE AND COST. PLFF PREPARES THE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OROZCO, LUZ MARIA VARGAS, MARCOS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 4796 MISSION STREET, #114, SF, CA $2,322.40 RENT, $520.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,922.40, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
